title: Malaxis metallica
intro: Malaxis metallica, also known as the metallic orchid, is a species of orchid native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Malaxis metallica include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Malaxis metallica is often prepared as a tincture or tea, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
